title: Vivi Is Separated from Luffy
description: On pages 12–15, vivi is separated from luffy as mr. 3 separates Vivi from her protectors and turns Little Garden’s battlefield into a calculated execution ground.
scene: Vivi Is Separated from Luffy. Mr. 3 separates Vivi from her protectors and turns Little Garden’s battlefield into a calculated execution ground. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The only one we deem as a threat is you, the strawhat boy.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So in order to separate the princess away from you,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We tried to get this bird to call out for the Princess but...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: He proved to be extra- Mely stubborn...!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Come on, then... just call for your master.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Kyahaha! Just let out one loud cry and we'll let you go.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Fine, I'll just have to force you then!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Call the Princess!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Hurry up and call her this instant!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Open your damn bill, you stupid bird!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But... now that the strawhat is unable to move,

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: This bird's of no use to us...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Carue!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Kyaha- haha! What a stupid bird.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: @Jack...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Kyaha- Hahahahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Why you...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Was it you who put the bomb in that barrel of rum!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm? Yeah, that was us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But who are you anyways?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Was he one of the people on the list?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: No, but I'm sure he's one of their crewmates. Let's eliminate him as well.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: So you're the ones who interferred with their duel...!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Why you...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: I'll kick all of your asses!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The ones who'll be eliminated are you your- selves!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: OH? So you'd like to play, Miss Wednesday...?

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: KYAHAHAHAHAHA! Just what chance do you think you'll stand against us officer agents?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Peacock swasher!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Take this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Certain kill!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Gun- Powder Star!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Alright!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Kyaha- haha! What a nice explo- give blast this is to ride on!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: nose

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Fancy...

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on vivi is separated from luffy. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
